steps.title: Calculate the sum from each group
steps.content: For Muskeget Island (240 seals, mean 88 inches): $240 \times 88 = 21,120$ inches. For Sable Island (120 seals, mean 94 inches): $120 \times 94 = 11,280$ inches.

steps.title: Find the combined mean using the weighted average formula
steps.content: Add the group sums: $21,120+11,280=32,400$ inches. Divide by the total count: $$\frac{32,400}{360}=90$$ inches. In Desmos, enter the weighted-mean expression directly. That matches choice B, so B is correct.
